label: The Sealmarked Chamber
description: The Sealmarked Chamber is a narrow upper room framed in dark timber and patched plaster, its floorboards reinforced with salvaged ashlar footings from the ruinfield masonry common to Varric Holdfast. A single high window remains shuttered behind an iron grille, keeping the space in regulated dimness consistent with the tavern’s lawbound character. The bed is built into a wall recess beside a small writing shelf, and the door bears a nailed copy of the city’s lodging ordinances beneath the licensing stamp. Linens smell of lamp smoke and damp wool carried up from the common room below.
